delivery_mode_reason: Devpost requires a public demo video URL and project story; no separate deck slot is required for judging.

frontend.dependency_policy: No frontend package dependencies for the core judge path; static report generated by Python.
frontend.non_tailwind_visual_signature: receipt IDs, evidence hash ribbons, verifier status stamps, trace-span rails
frontend.visual_differentiation_note: Looks like a forensic evidence bench, not a SaaS dashboard, graph visualizer, or chat assistant.

qr_mobile_access.entry: QR code opens static report or README demo section
qr_mobile_access.mobile_primary_flow: Tap a receipt ID and read claim status in <= 2 taps
qr_mobile_access.desktop_parity_plan: Desktop keeps full terminal/report split and keyboard-friendly anchors

asset_sources.logo: logo-generator skill output planned; repo-native SVG fallback

cutout_assets.command: not used; no generated cutout assets required

domain.name: cybersecurity-dfir
domain.professional_context: SANS SIFT / Protocol SIFT autonomous incident response, read-only evidence handling, claim traceability, accuracy validation.

deploy.cloudflare_override_reason: Core product must run in the Linux terminal / SIFT Workstation environment. Static docs/report can deploy to Cloudflare Pages, but the judged hero path is local terminal execution.

required_env.name: TRACEWARDEN_NO_EXTERNAL_KEYS_REQUIRED
required_env.storage: not required; local evidence files and SIFT-compatible adapters are used

real_data_sources.evidence: Evidence hashes and parser outputs saved in run manifest
Accuracy report compares claim IDs to ground truth
MCP-style read-only schema aligns with Protocol SIFT extension surface

product_backbone.multi_user_proof: Stateless exception: analyst, maintainer, and judge roles inspect the same local run artifacts; reruns create distinct run IDs.
product_backbone.stateless_exception_reason: FIND EVIL requires a Linux/SIFT terminal agent, not hosted multi-user SaaS.

user_case_beats.beat: Run packaged case and watch unsupported claim revoked
user_case_beats.state_change: claim status transitions and reports saved

user_case_beats.beat: Attempt path escape and verify guardrail refusal

prd_coverage.minimum: Every P0/P1 REQ-### row maps to route/API/real-data/test/deploy evidence before recording.

notes: Cloudflare is used for static judge-facing docs if deployed; the core challenge surface is local terminal execution.
